Hi, I’ve been wanting to play this game because everyone is writing good reviews but, I have my VR taken away….sooo can some people like this so I can get my VR back plz, and can I maybe have the stick? Creator you don’t have to but you can if you want,also if you’re stressed out about everyone asking for the stick, listen to Treehouse by Alex G it really helps when I’m stressed.

I’m just having fun on the game Until this guy named nugge (please ban him) all of the sudden wants to play grow a garden in the game, I say one swear word (I’m sorry) but then he immediately goes to report me I asked him why he reported me he didn’t even say why he just reported me over and over again so please don’t ban me because of this guy but overall this game is good.

developer_response.body: Why did you swear though? That is something you can get reported for.
